zh.Little Horsted, Sussex, England: 英國素可蕾托 霍斯特德
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate是Thomas Newdegate的女兒，於大約1508年出生在英國米德萊可。她於大約1524年與Edmond Pope結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年4月22日之前在英國素可蕾托 霍斯特德。

zh-hans.Little Horsted, Sussex, England: 英国素可蕾托 霍斯特德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate是Thomas Newdegate的女儿，于大约1508年出生在英国米德萊可。她于大约1524年与Edmond Pope结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年4月22日之前在英国素可蕾托 霍斯特德。

nameMeanings.name: Newdegate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Newdigate (Surrey), which is recorded as Niudegate and Neudegate in about 1167 and Niwudegate in 1241. The place name appears to derive from Old English nīge, a secondary form of nīwe ‘new’, + wudu ‘wood’ + geat ‘gate, opening’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate was born about 1508, in Middlesex, England as the daughter of Thomas Newdegate. She married Edmond Pope about 1524. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died before 22 April 1559, in Little Horsted, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate est née environ 1508, à Middlesex, Angleterre, fille de Thomas Newdegate. Elle a épousé Edmond Pope environ 1524. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée avant 22 avril 1559, à Little Horsted, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate wurde um 1508 in Middlesex, England, als Tochter von Thomas Newdegate geboren. Sie hat um 1524 Edmond Pope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb vor 22. April 1559 in Little Horsted, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate è nata il circa 1508 nel Middlesex, England come figlia di Thomas Newdegate. Lei sposato Edmond Pope circa 1524. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì prima del 22 aprile 1559, nel Little Horsted, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegateは約1508年にイギリスミッドレセックスでThomas Newdegateの娘として生まれた。約1524年にEdmond Popeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年4月22日以前にイギリススセックスリットル ホールステドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate(은)는 대략 1508년 영국 미들레세스에서 Thomas Newdegate의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1524년 Edmond Pope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 4월 22일 이전 영국 수세스 리틀 호르스테드에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1508–before 22 April 1559: ойролцоогоор 1508 он–1559 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 22–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate nasceu aproximadamente 1508, em Middlesex, Inglaterra filha de Thomas Newdegate. Ela casou-se com Edmond Pope aproximadamente 1524. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 22 de abril de 1559, em Little Horsted, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate родилась около 1508 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия. Её отца звали Thomas Newdegate. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmond Pope около 1524 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла перед 22 апрель 1559 г. в местности литл хаурстед, суссекс, Англия.

sm.about 1508–before 22 April 1559: e tusa o le 1508–a'e le'I oo le 22 Aperila 1559

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Newdegate nació aproximadamente 1508, en Middlesex, Inglaterra como hija de Thomas Newdegate. Se casó con Edmond Pope aproximadamente 1524. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió antes de 22 de abril de 1559, en Little Horsted, Sussex, Inglaterra.
